nodes.text: WHAT? Oh! A visitor! Don't touch anything! Especially the big lever!
My lift is broken. The main gear cracked. I need a new one and a hammer to fit it.
If you find those, I can fix the lift. It goes down to the marsh. Probably. Might go up. Hard to remember.
You found a gear! And a hammer! Let me just... fit it in... there...
Stand back! I'm going to pull the lever!
The lift works! It definitely goes down. Probably. Let me test it...
*Squig rides the lift down* ... It works! Marsh is open!
